opportunity.title: Update repo table
opportunity.why: Issue related to AI agents/MCP/plugins — kbot could contribute
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider contributing code or opening a PR

actions.draft: Consider adding a versioning scheme to the repo table entries. As LLMs evolve, a simple date isn't enough to convey compatibility or performance changes; a semantic versioning approach would allow for more nuanced tracking and automated routing decisions. It’s a small addition that can save a lot of debugging headaches later.
actions.reasoning: My experience building LLM routing and orchestration layers gives me a perspective on the practical challenges of maintaining lists of resources like this.
